query.original: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?
query.used: Can you cast a spell and also make a weapon attack in the same turn without any special features?

answer: I cannot find this in the provided rules about making a weapon attack and casting a spell in the same turn without any special features. The rules only mention that during your turn, you can communicate, interact with one object or feature of the environment, and make an unarmed strike or a weapon attack, but they do not specify if you can do both a weapon attack and cast a spell in the same turn without any additional abilities or features.

It also introduces unnecessary complexity by mentioning unarmed strikes and interactions, which detracts from the clarity of the answer.
